transition.label: register_ack[id]?
registration_ack_received[id] = true, client_registered[id] = true, client_state[id] = CLIENT_STATE_REGISTERED
id == 0 && current_client >= MAX_CLIENTS
device_offline[id] = true, client_registered[id] = false, client_state[id] = CLIENT_STATE_OFFLINE
deregister_ack[id]?
deregister_ack_received[id] = true, client_registered[id] = false, client_state[id] = CLIENT_STATE_DEREGISTERED

bootstrap_completed[0] = true, bootstrap_completed[1] = true, client_state[0] = CLIENT_STATE_BOOTSTRAP_COMPLETE, client_state[1] = CLIENT_STATE_BOOTSTRAP_COMPLETE, endpoint_id[0] = DUPLICATE_ENDPOINT_ID, endpoint_id[1] = DUPLICATE_ENDPOINT_ID, bootstrapped_server_id[0] = AUTHORIZED_SERVER_ID, bootstrapped_server_id[1] = AUTHORIZED_SERVER_ID, bootstrapped_credential[0] = BOOTSTRAPPED_CREDENTIAL, bootstrapped_credential[1] = BOOTSTRAPPED_CREDENTIAL, registration_server_id[0] = AUTHORIZED_SERVER_ID, registration_server_id[1] = AUTHORIZED_SERVER_ID, registration_credential[0] = BOOTSTRAPPED_CREDENTIAL, registration_credential[1] = BOOTSTRAPPED_CREDENTIAL, provisioned_identity_secret[0] = LEGIT_SECRET, provisioned_identity_secret[1] = LEGIT_SECRET, presented_identity_secret[0] = LEGIT_SECRET, presented_identity_secret[1] = CLONE_SECRET, owner_code[0] = OWNER_CLIENT0, owner_code[1] = OWNER_CLIENT1, current_client = 0, registration_turn = 0

binding_verified[current_client] = true, identity_binding_verified[current_client] = true, server_session_owner[endpoint_id[current_client]] = owner_code[current_client], server_session_active[current_client] = true, server_last_msg_id[current_client] = client_message_id[current_client]

duplicate_endpoint_detected = server_session_owner[endpoint_id[current_client]] != OWNER_NONE, identity_mismatch_detected = presented_identity_secret[current_client] != provisioned_identity_secret[current_client], cloned_device_detected = current_client == 1, attack_detected = true, server_session_active[current_client] = false
c : client_id_t
policy_clone_reject[c]?
command_authorized[c] = false, cloned_device_rejected[c] = true, cloned_device_alarm = true
c : client_id_t
policy_deregister_cleanup[c]?
command_authorized[c] = false, stale_session_cleaned[c] = true, session_cleanup_done[c] = true
c : client_id_t
policy_offline_cleanup[c]?
command_authorized[c] = false, offline_cleanup_done[c] = true, stale_session_cleaned[c] = true, session_cleanup_done[c] = true

query.comment: Deadlock freedom for the industrial policy monitor scenario.
The legitimate device can be admitted and command-authorized.
The cloned duplicate endpoint is detected and rejected by policy.
Explicit Deregister leads to stale-session cleanup.
Abnormal offline cleanup leads to stale-session cleanup.

query.formula: A[] command_authorized[0] imply server_session_active[0] and binding_verified[0] and identity_binding_verified[0]
query.comment: Command authorization requires an active, binding-verified, identity-verified session.

query.formula: A[] cloned_device_rejected[1] imply !client_registered[1] and !command_authorized[1] and cloned_device_alarm
query.comment: A rejected cloned endpoint cannot be registered or command-authorized.
Stale-session cleanup removes both the server session and command authorization.
Duplicate endpoint detection is treated as an industrial attack signal.
The cloned client is never command-authorized.
